{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided in the documents, the upper lip is formed through the fusion of the maxillary, lateral nasal, and median nasal processes. Document [28] specifically states that 'Fusion with the medial nasal processes results in mesenchymal commingling in the intermaxillary territory, producing a single, continuous maxilla and the upper lip and palate.' This indicates that the maxillary, lateral nasal, and median nasal processes are involved in the formation of the upper lip.", "answer_choice": "C"}
